title: Personal Finance Dashboard
description: An interactive dashboard for tracking income, expenses, and savings goals. Built with Excel and Power BI to visualize spending patterns over time.
content: This project involved building a comprehensive personal finance tracker using Excel for data entry and Power BI for visualization. The dashboard shows monthly income vs expenses, category breakdowns, and savings rate trends.

title: Corporate Tax Case Study
description: A detailed analysis of tax planning strategies for a mid-size manufacturing company, exploring deductions, credits, and entity structure optimization.
content: An academic case study examining how a fictional manufacturing company could optimize its tax position through strategic planning, timing of deductions, and choice of entity structure.

title: Audit Simulation Report
description: Simulated a full audit engagement for a retail company, including risk assessment, sampling techniques, and audit documentation.
content: A semester-long project simulating a real audit engagement. Covered planning, fieldwork, and reporting phases with emphasis on identifying material misstatements and evaluating internal controls.
